latin: Me offero in vicem! soror mea electa erat sed ego pro ea steti. me offero! nemo aliam puellam tam fortem umquam viderat.

questions.target: Braver than anyone had ever seen
choices: Braver than anyone had ever seen

translation: I volunteer as tribute! My sister had been chosen but I stood in her place. I volunteer! No one had ever seen another girl so brave.
